chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 223 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.1736/2014 2. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the applicant Mr. Asif Ali Siyal, advocate for respondent It is contended that the impugned judgment dated 03.06.2014, passed in Customs Appeal Nos.K-253 and K-280 of 2013 is a non-speaking order and the same has not befitting the learned Tribunal being the last fact- finding forum in the statutory hierarchy. By consent, the impugned judgment is set aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
